corrections.note: Printed form is second person plural/imperative-like ending in the scan, not future middle 3sg.
Transcript has a different verb; image clearly reads παροξύνῃς.
Separator bar after A is present in the apparatus.

corrections.current: και ο αγαπων...επʼ εσχατων (10)] om καρδια σκληρα (10)..εμπεσεται ℵc.a
corrections.correct: και ο αγαπων...επʼ εσχατων (10)] om καρδια σκληρα (10)..εμπεσειτε ℵc.a
corrections.note: Apparatus lemma follows the printed body reading ἐμπεσεῖτε, not ἐμπεσεῖται.

corrections.current: καρδια...επ εσχατων (20) unc incl B] ab om ℵAC
corrections.correct: καρδια...επ εσχατων (20) unc incl B] abest om ℵAC
corrections.note: Printed apparatus reads abest, not ab.

notes: Outer-margin numbers in parentheses are line indicators and were not incorrectly absorbed into the body. Page number 650 at foot correctly omitted from transcription.
